70010000079293.description:
In Cannibal Tales, you play the role of a young and ambitious journalist determined to make a career. Your goal is to get a scoop that will allow you to become a partner in the newspaper you work for.
You focus on the mystery surrounding a young survivor of a metropolitan cannibal, determined to obtain an interview to unravel the connection between them and understand the reason behind his life being spared, unaware of the dangerous consequences that this choice will entail. During the interview, your morality will be put to the test as the line between good and evil grows increasingly blurred. Will you let yourself be consumed by selfishness and the pursuit of personal success, or will you do what is right?
Cannibal Tales is an engaging visual novel that will put you face-to-face with complex choices and the consequences of your actions.
70010000079293.intro: Horror thriller visual novel written by cult director Ruggero Deodato. A cannibal story in three episodes.
70010000079293.name: Cannibal Tales

70010000103810.description:
Adjust the temperature and relax in the spa!

Sokobear Winter is a relaxing puzzle game with 40 cozy levels to warm up your day!
Push the logs into the correct spots to raise the spa’s temperature to perfection. But beware: blocks of ice block your path and must be broken before you can move forward.

Challenge yourself to complete each stage with the fewest moves and in the shortest time possible.

Things can get tricky… how do you get that log over there if you can only push?

Features:

Break ice blocks and push logs

A cute bear to keep you company

40 unique and challenging levels
70010000103810.name: Sokobear Winter

70010000106161.description:
With over 1.5 million copies sold worldwide, the legendary zombie-hunting action game LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW finally returns in a remastered edition!

Using the nimble moves she mastered through cheerleading and wielding a massive chainsaw, Juliet slices through hordes of zombies in exhilarating action.
The Chain Hit Hunting system increases chainsaw attack speed as your combo count rises, and the newly added Chainsaw Blaster with auto-fire pushes the excitement even further!
With improved playability, dazzling visual effects that brighten the screen, and brand-new background music, there’s plenty to enjoy.

Enhanced graphics, a newly added difficulty mode, and many other quality improvements bring the game to a whole new level. This isn’t just a nostalgic revival—it’s a fully refined rebirth of Lollipop Chainsaw in every way!
Introducing LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP!

＜Story＞
Juliet attends the massive San Romero High School in the American West. She’s an ordinary high school girl who loves cheerleading more than anything.

Right now, she has two worries.
First, she’s gained some weight thanks to her favorite lollipop candy.
Second, she’s trying to figure out how to tell her new boyfriend Nick that she’s actually a zombie hunter.

And that’s a tough one… because zombie hunters send the undead to heaven for a living. Not exactly the kind of job a young lady casually talks about!

One morning, as Juliet pedals her bike in a rush—already running late to meet Nick—a horde of zombies suddenly appears before her.
As fate would have it, that day is also Juliet’s 18th birthday. Annoyed that her birthday has turned into the worst day ever, Juliet pulls a chainsaw from her bag and charges into the school, now overrun by zombies, in search of her beloved Nick!
70010000106161.intro: The cute and sexy zombie hunter Juliet goes wild again on Nintendo Switch™ 2 !
70010000106161.name: LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000106801.description:
Beat the Champions is arcade football pushed to the extreme. Face legendary players in explosive matches full of rhythm, skill, and special abilities. Charge up and unleash your powers, control the pitch with precise movements, and make split-second decisions. Timing changes everything.

Outside the box, there are no fouls, creating constant action, riskier confrontations near the goal, and decisive moments that can change the match in an instant. Every game is dynamic and unpredictable, whether in quick matches or tournaments.

Plus, you can choose from historic Argentina National Team squads thanks to the official license of the Argentine Football Association (AFA). Score goals and make incredible plays with Messi, Maradona, Batistuta, and many other Albiceleste legends.

Beat the Champions is guaranteed fun for a World Cup year.


* Special Abilities System
* Argentina National Teams from all eras, officially licensed by AFA
* 100% Arcade Gameplay
* Dynamic and Intense Matches
* No fouls, except inside the box
* Local and Competitive Modes
* Experience the International Cup with 2026 atmosphere
70010000106801.intro: A fast-paced arcade football game where legendary players clash in explosive matches powered by special abilities. No realism — just speed, skill, and pure competitive chaos.
70010000106801.name: Beat The Champions

70010000111300.description:
Judero is an action/ adventure game inspired by the rich folk history of the Scottish Borders. You play as Judero, a Celt who can establish a rapport with the nature around him. Travel with Judero through a handcrafted landscape as he discovers there is an evil at work manipulating the unguarded.

Strike and dodge your way through a myriad of foes culminating in exciting and unique boss challenges.

Take on the form of lesser creatures to greatly expand your abilities. Use these enchanted minions in combat and to solve puzzles.

Discover the world of Judero through branching dialogues and pithy, aphoristic NPCs.

Through your adventures you will encounter a number of diverse Mini Games with differing mechanics and visual styles. Mini games also vary the pace of the game and allow us to explore other narrative tangents.

There are many secrets and discoveries to find as you roam through the world of Judero. From collectables and pick-ups to whole optional story-lines and more.

Judero is made from handcrafted objects and bespoke figurines, animated in the stop-motion tradition. For us, this art style invokes something nostalgic; in part comical but perhaps a little bit creepy too. These real life elements are then rendered into a 3D world to evoke a unique visual style. Using this style we can bring in digital techniques like real-time lighting, shaders and post-processing effects. Cutscenes will be made using traditional stop-motion animation techniques with greater fidelity to give a more cinematic quality.

The music in Judero is an homage to traditional British folk music such as those documented by Francis James Child. Many of these songs are hundreds of years old and it has been an honour researching and learning them. We are keeping instrumentation acoustic and mostly authentic to the originals (mostly) but with contemporary arrangements and harmonies.
70010000111300.intro: Judero is a handmade action/ adventure game inspired by the rich folk history of the Scottish Borders. You play as Judero, a Celt who can establish a rapport with the nature around him.
70010000111300.name: Judero

70010000111715.description:
Handed the keys to a rundown ranch, it’s up to you to restore your family’s legacy and become an equestrian legend! With the help of a host of colorful characters, you’ll raise charming foals, manage your dream stable of horses, and bring the ranch back to its former glory.

Ride your way — take the reins to feel the thrill and thunder on the racecourse, hone your jumping skills on the Cross Country course, explore the ranch with your horses, and so much more.

RACE AND RIDE TO VICTORY
• Feel all the excitement of the racecourse with realistic, motion-captured animations and dynamic race commentary.
• Race in story mode or online multiplayer in locations inspired by famous race tracks from around the globe.
• Put your jumping skills to the test in Cross Country.

ENJOY THE EQUESTRIAN LIFESTYLE
• Relax and explore gorgeous open locations with your horses, from the ranch to the scenic Swiss Alps.
• Capture stunning images of your horses with the feature-packed Photo Mode.
• Earn and manage resources to upgrade your homestead.

BREED YOUR DREAM HORSES
• Breed adorable foals with unique coats and patterns.
• Craft a legendary lineage with the in-depth genetic breeding system.
• Design your perfect horse with the Horse Creator.
70010000111715.intro: Take the reins and become an equestrian legend!
70010000111715.name: Rival Stars Horse Racing

70010000112006.description:
Race tiny vehicles across oversized household tracks in Micro Overdrive: Home Tour, a fast and colorful arcade racing game inspired by classic top-down racers.

Compete through the Home Tour solo mode, unlock new cups and drivers, and master unpredictable tracks filled with playful hazards, sharp turns, and surprising twists.

Play solo or challenge friends in local Cup Mode for up to 4 players. Choose your driver, pick your difficulty, and enjoy quick, chaotic races built for couch competition.

Features:
- Home Tour solo progression
- Local multiplayer for up to 4 players
- Unlockable drivers and cups
- 6 themed championships
- 10 unique drivers
- Responsive controls
- Classic top-down arcade racing
70010000112006.intro: Tiny cars. Giant tracks. Big arcade racing fun!
70010000112006.name: Micro Overdrive: Home Tour

70010000112640.description:
Explore Bluey’s World of Play!

Join everyone's favorite blue heeler with a new story by the show's creator in Bluey's Quest for The Gold Pen.

When Dad snatches the Gold Pen Bluey needs to finish her drawing, Bluey and her family are swept into a world of fun and adventure. Explore charming, hand-drawn worlds, uncover hidden treasures, and solve playful puzzles as you help bring the Gold Pen home.

Written by Joe Brumm, this original story features fully-animated cutscenes and exploration-focused gameplay, designed to be enjoyed by fans of all ages. 

Key Features:

An Original Bluey Story. Written by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm, this adventure captures the warmth, humor, and heart of the beloved series.

A World Drawn from Play. Explore nine charming, hand-drawn worlds — from golden beaches and snowy mountains to the iconic Australian Outback and beyond.

Wild Rides & Playful Exploration. Travel by boat, bike, jetpack, and glider on a fun-filled quest.

Fun Challenges & Playful Puzzles. Help Bluey and Bingoose outwit pesky cane toads, sleepy council workers, and naughty bin chickens by finding clues, solving puzzles, and uncovering hidden treasures.

Fully-Animated Story Moments. Expressive cutscenes bring Bluey’s world and adventures to life. 

An Experience for the Whole Family. Easy-to-learn controls make this adventure fun to watch, share, and take turns playing.
70010000112640.intro: Join Bluey in a heartfelt, story-driven adventure. Explore hand-drawn worlds and enjoy an original family-friendly story written by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm.
70010000112640.name: Bluey's Quest For The Gold Pen

70010000112995.description:
Night Swarm is a vampire-themed roguelite RPG bullet hell where you play as a fearsome young vampire lord rising to power. Gather loyal allies, unleash devastating abilities, and fight back against the relentless werewolf hordes that threaten to consume the night.

BUILD YOUR SWARM. TEAR THROUGH THE PACK.
Ancient powers of the dark stand behind you, each offering unique, cursed blessings to aid your ascent.
Uncover why these shadowy forces have chosen to support you, unravel the truth behind the age-old war between vampires and werewolves, and delve into the haunted pasts of your companions as you push deeper into the cursed lands.
The night is yours—and you are hungry.

GROW STRONG — AND MAKE OTHERS STRONGER
Let your legend travel faster than your shadow, becoming a beacon of hope for those still resisting in the dark.
They await a new Vampire Lord—a leader worthy of the night. That leader is you.
Rally them to your side. Show them how to fight. And remind the world that the true terror of the night... is you.

YOU HAVE WORK TO DO TONIGHT
Aid friendly creatures, uncover hidden treasures, restore the natural order, and bring balance back to the night.
Sometimes you'll help your allies. Sometimes—even your enemies. Because to truly reclaim the night, it's not enough to defeat your foes; you must also ensure your friends rise with you.
By guiding others to victory, you earn their trust—and their aid in your fight against ancient evils. The night is a delicate web of power, and only those who understand its balance can hope to survive it.
70010000112995.intro: Vampiric roguelite RPG where you rise and battle werewolf hordes.
70010000112995.name: Night Swarm

70010000113487.description:
Challenge a friend to a tennis match where you can play as SpongeBob, Aang, and all your Nickelodeon favorites in fast-paced, local split-screen action!

All-Star Nickelodeon Characters: Pick your star player from among 15 iconic Nickelodeon characters from SpongeBob SquarePants, Avatar: The Last Airbender, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles and more!

Play It Your Style: Choose from over 500 outfits and accessories to customize your Nickelodeon character your way, and show off your personality on the tennis court. Turn the tide of the match with powerful ultimate abilities that are unique to every character!

Play Solo or Local 1v1: Challenge a friend or family member to a 1v1 couch co-op split-screen tennis match, or play in Story Mode at your own speed!

Instant Fun for Everyone: You don't need to be a pro to have fun! Start playing instantly with easy-to-learn controls, accessible for the entire family.

Multiple Ways to Play: From classic matches to fun mini-games, there's something for everyone. Embark on a narrated Story Mode, dive into Mini-Games for extra fun, or rise to the top in Tournament Mode to claim your victory!
70010000113487.intro: Hit the tennis court for some fast-paced arcade action as your favorite Nickelodeon all-star! Customize SpongeBob and more legendary characters, then enjoy couch co-op matches!
70010000113487.name: Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next!

70010000113642.description:
Inspired by cult classic thrillers, this is an experience that will pull you in – and won’t let go. Dark, intense, and deeply unsettling, every moment pushes you further into the unknown.

In a cruel twist of fate, everything you know is torn apart. Your significant other is kidnapped and you’re next. Trapped by a masked maniac, you must fight to survive by solving intricate puzzles and navigating deadly rooms filled with traps. Uncover buried secrets, piece together the truth, and confront a past that refuses to stay hidden. 

Will you escape… or become part of the nightmare?

N.E.R.D Features:
• 3 handcrafted levels packed with challenging puzzles
• A fully cinematic experience with real actors
• A time pressure mode for heightened tension and immersion
• 12 achievements to test your logic and determination
70010000113642.intro: N.E.R.D is a story-driven escape room puzzle game, brought to life as a gripping interactive movie.
70010000113642.name: N.E.R.D

70010000114346.description:
The world of the Wall awaits. Wall World 2 builds on the mining rogue-lite experience with expanded mechanics, new challenges, and deeper gameplay. Explore procedurally generated mines full of new discoveries and dangers. Extract valuable resources, harness lost technologies, and upgrade your robospider and exosuit to survive against hordes of raging monsters. Venture through incredible biomes and uncover the secrets entombed in the depths of the Wall.

DELVE INTO THE MYSTERIES OF THE WALL
Venture deep into the World Wall in your robospider. The mysterious Hole holds both deadly threats and long-lost answers. Risk everything to find out what lies on the other side of the unseen depths.

BATTLE ON ALL FRONTS
Monsters lurk everywhere — not only on the surface of the Wall, but also within its mines. Arm yourself with an arsenal of powerful weapons and abilities to fight off any threat that stands between you and the truth.

ADAPT TO A LIVING WORLD
The endless Wall is ever-changing. Its depths contain not only resources and technologies, but also anomalies that can help or hinder your journey. Navigate incredible biomes, overcome obstacles and discover new wonders as you carve your path deeper inside.

UPGRADE AND CUSTOMIZE
Customize your robospider between expeditions and meet new characters in the sphere city. You'll have plenty of options to upgrade and enhance the equipment of both your exosuit and your mobile battle station. Each of them brings you one step closer to conquering the Wall.
70010000114346.intro: The adventure in the mysterious world of the Wall continues!
70010000114346.name: Wall World 2

70010000116078.description:
Get ready for a relaxing and charming puzzle where every move matters and every solution brings that satisfying sense of accomplishment. You take control of a dedicated farmer pig on a mission to organize carrots and radishes into their correct planting spots.

Inspired by classic logic games, it transforms simplicity into a clever challenge. Push, test paths, undo mistakes when needed, and discover the best way to organize each scenario without pressure or time limits.

Explore two delightful environments, the Farm and the Greenhouse, each with unique obstacles that require planning and strategy. With 30 carefully designed levels, the game offers short and satisfying challenges, perfect for players who enjoy calm thinking and creative problem solving.

Plan each move, refine your strategy, and enjoy the moment when everything falls perfectly into place.
70010000116078.name: Piggy's Farm

70010000116932.description:
Math Pals – Dino Academy is an educational math game designed for preschool and elementary school children.
Kids learn essential math skills—counting, addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division—in a playful, stress-free environment guided by friendly dinosaur characters.
Each topic is divided into areas with 20 carefully designed levels. Difficulty increases slowly and clearly, starting with small numbers and visual aids and growing toward larger numbers and more complex tasks. Every level includes a highscore and a star rating, helping children and parents instantly see progress and strengths.
Learning happens through varied multiple-choice quizzes: counting objects, adding dice, fingers, animals, finding missing numbers, and more. Tasks change frequently to keep learning fresh and engaging while built-in spaced repetition helps children remember and practice what they’ve already learned.
Positive feedback, celebrations, and clear progression motivate children to keep going—while mistakes are treated gently as part of the learning process.
Math Pals – Dino Academy turns math into a friendly adventure—one level, one star, and one happy dinosaur at a time.
70010000116932.intro: Learn math step by step with friendly dinos and fun quizzes.
70010000116932.name: Math Pals - Dino Academy

70010000118888.description:
Jump into fast-paced open-wheel racing and test your skills on the track.

In Formula 2026: Rise of Legends, you’ll drive powerful race cars, take on challenging circuits, and compete against skilled AI drivers. Every race is a chance to improve, push your limits, and climb the ranks.

Whether you're looking for quick racing action or a full career journey, the track is yours.

Features:

Smooth and responsive driving controls
Exciting races on multiple circuits
Career Mode and Quick Race
Competitive AI opponents
Immersive cockpit and dynamic camera views

Win races, improve your driving, and prove you have what it takes to become a racing legend.
70010000118888.intro:
Jump into high-speed racing action
Master every corner
Rise to become a legend
70010000118888.name: Formula 2026: Rise of Legends

70010000120522.description: Running across the road is a very challenging task for a little chicken. Lots of very fast cars and unexpected obstacles. You need a good reaction to help this cute little guy. Don't forget that he has friends and they also want to cross the road.
70010000120522.name: Risky Roads

70010000121669.description:
One Move Away is a 3D, first-person game that blends packing based puzzles with a beautiful art style. Strategically pack away possessions at various stages of three characters' lives.

As we go through life, the number of possessions we accumulate grows, making packing a difficult task. This vast collection of belongings becomes challenging when it's time to pack.

Pack Your Way!

Whether you're a meticulous or chaotic packer, One Move Away challenges you to pack your way. Optimize your strategy or embrace the mess, just make sure the boot closes! 

Handle with care or else…

Be prepared for every action to have a reaction. Expect realistic physics, just like in real life. Items placed carelessly can have a domino effect, pile them too high, and they’ll all fall down! 

Experience the ultimate satisfaction of perfectly packing numerous items, expertly placing each one into its rightful space. Revel in the sense of accomplishment that comes from seeing the packing process from start to finish.

Packing Perfection

Challenge yourself, with multiple objectives to hit that will require you to think strategically .Each level gives you a new packing challenge with different sizes, shapes, and space limits to work around. Can you beat the clock and achieve packing perfection?
70010000121669.intro: A deeply satisfying puzzle game about moving.
70010000121669.name: One Move Away

70010000122077.description:
You may have seen these kanji before—but can you actually read them?
This quiz game lets you enjoy learning rare and tricky Japanese kanji through fun fill-in-the-blank puzzles.

From animals and plants to foods, place names, and everyday words, a wide variety of categories awaits.
Some answers will come to you in a flash, while others will leave you scratching your head. The more you play, the more your vocabulary and kanji knowledge will grow.

Play solo to challenge yourself, or enjoy solving questions together with family and friends.
Turn “I’ve seen it before” into “I can read it!” and take on a quiz experience that is both fun and rewarding.
70010000122077.intro: Think you know kanji? Put your skills to the test with tricky fill-in-the-blank puzzles!
70010000122077.name: Even Native Japanese Struggle Japanese Kanji Fill-in Quiz

70010000122639.description:
School, work, home—there are lots of places to play!
Enjoy the thrill as you try not to get caught!
Up to 6 players can join in the fun with a Joy-Con™ for each player!
Watch for the perfect timing to earn as many points as possible!

《Roles》
・Actor
  Play to earn points and try not to get caught!
  Play at a sparkling location to earn even more points!

・Watcher
  Find people playing to earn points!

[Time Attack]
Aim for the fastest clear possible and climb the rankings!
Play without getting caught and try to reduce your time!

[Battle]
Compete for the highest score against friends and CPUs!
Play skillfully to earn the most points!

[Online Mode]
Play in real time against players around the world!
Up to 4 people can play at a time!

In friendly and online matches, the roles are decided randomly!
Finding out which role you'll be is part of the fun!
70010000122639.intro:
Let's stir up some undercover chaos!
Slip past teachers, bosses, and parents, and play to your heart's content!
70010000122639.name: Sneaky Secret Mission!

70010000122658.description:
■ How to Play

Throw, Merge, and Grow!: Just drop the "Yukkuri" into the bowl! When two of the same kind touch, they transform into a larger Yukkuri!

Don't Let Them Fall!: It's Game Over if the Yukkuri overflow from the bowl...

Aim for the High Score!: Growing them large and triggering consecutive merges (Chains) will skyrocket your score!

■ Reimu & Marisa’s Live Commentary!

Reimu and Marisa chat away with game-style commentary based on your play!

Their lively banter and reactions make every match even more exciting!

■ Fully Customizable Features

30 Different Yukkuri!: Play the game, earn points, and head to the shop to unlock new Yukkuri.

Customize the Evolution Order!: You can swap the order of evolution! Set your favorite character as the largest size and create your very own "Yukkuri Mountain"!

■ Various Game Modes

Multiplayer: Supports local matches for up to 4 players! Enjoy a heart-pounding stacking battle together!

Rankings: Compete with players worldwide for the top score and prove you’re the ultimate Yukkuri master!
70010000122658.intro:
3D Puzzle: Take It Easy!!!
Touhou Project characters are here in their "Yukkuri" forms!
70010000122658.name: Touhou Yukkuri Mountain

70010000122676.description:
Move through 3D space to find hints, solve mysteries and escape from the room.
Anyone can play to the end because you can see hints and answers.
70010000122676.name: Escape game R00M13

70010000123080.description:
◆Synopsis
“If you do not wake up... I will play a little prank on you.”

As being the only son of a noble family in the kingdom, 
the personal maid you have hired was your childhood friend Rica Hanamiya.

Having Rica by your side everyday, at every moment,
she teases you nonstop, and your heart would not stop racing!
Hoping that this life would go on forever.

But--

One remark from your father shakes both of your hearts.
Can the two with a different status share the same fate--

◆Characters
Rica Hanamiya（CV：Rica Hanamiya）
Your childhood friend who became your personal maid.
She is diligent and professional on duty, but changes when it is just the two of you.
She loves teasing you and enjoys watching you be nervous.
Maid and a master, also a childhood friend--
Caught between those position, what does she truly feel?

○Novel Game Brand "Rabbitfoot”
A novel game brand that delivers novel games casting active YouTubers and VTubers as game characters.
As well as using their names and nicknames, you can enjoy the different sides of your faves and feel a close connection through the novel game that you cannot experience in the usual streaming or video uploads.
70010000123080.intro: A visual novel with AMSR starring the VTuber Rica Hanamiya.
70010000123080.name: Rica Mode♡

70010000124361.description:
Clown Is Hungry is a comedy horror game about delivering a pizza to a scary Clown.

The pizza girl Kat is already late to a party, but she has one more pizza to deliver late at night. The town is quiet, but this neighborhood seems to be sinister and creepy. Kat finds weird signs in the street warning about pizza, and to never deliver any pizza here. Kat decides that she has to do her job anyway and ignores the warnings, but soon she realizes that they are there for a reason as she knocks on the door of the last house on the street, where the Clown lives.

The game tells a comedic and terrifying story - playing as Kat, the player must deliver the pizza to the scary Clown, but she keeps dropping it on the ground and has to make a new one before the Clown hunts her. Find pizza ingredients, food or other items, put them into a pizza and pray that you don't drop it on your next step. The Clown's world is full of dangers and surprises: traps, minigames, challenges, weird characters, monsters, puzzles and scares - all in a surreal and funhouse/circus aesthetic.

Fun and scary features:
- Pizza box inventory that allows you to turn every item into a slice of pizza
- Mini games! Cheese basketball, tomato cannons, balloons popping, clown-like character challenges...
- Survival horror with the Clown on your tail
- Charming characters you'll meet along the way
- Many various environments to explore
- Terrifying horror parts as well as hilarious jokes, not overstepping on each other to bring you a great experience
70010000124361.intro: Clown Is Hungry is a comedy horror game about delivering a pizza to a hungry clown.
70010000124361.name: Clown Is Hungry

70010000124435.description:
BACKROOMS: ESCAPE THE BRAINROT

The internet has lost its mind. And you're trapped inside.

Enter a mental maze where every room is a rotten meme, every corridor an anxiety attack, and every entity a nightmare laughing at you. A blend of fear, absurdity, and disturbing brilliance that will make you scream, then laugh at how loud you're screaming.

Locations you'll want to forget

Faded poolrooms drowning in dead silence. Endless backrooms heavy with oppressive déjà vu. Brainrot-rooms born from the most feverish corners of the web. Every space is a visual trap.

Entities that laugh at you

Deformed living memes, original nightmare creatures, and brainrot icons reimagined as horror abominations. They want you dead — but first, they want to break your mind.

Gameplay on the edge of panic

Survive, explore, find the brainrot objects, and search for a way out. Dynamic jumpscares, eerie collectibles, cryptic notes, and secret events that change everything.

Free mode

When the story ends, unlock exploration mode: revisit every location, tweak the rules, add more monsters and more brainrot with a single click. Every run is different.

You've seen the backrooms. But you've never escaped them like this.
70010000124435.intro: A grotesque horror born from a rotten internet. Decayed memes, laughing entities, rooms where everything feels wrong. Scream, laugh, and escape the backrooms.
70010000124435.name: Backrooms: Escape The Brainrot

70010000125118.description:
Place letters, build words, and get familiar with katakana in a fun and friendly way. This educational word game helps children practice reading, writing, and recognizing katakana step by step.

With simple controls and approachable gameplay, even first-time learners can play with confidence. It is perfect for kids who are just starting to study Japanese characters, as well as anyone looking for a light and enjoyable learning activity.

Make learning part of play and discover katakana one word at a time.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000125118.intro: Learn katakana the fun, easy way.
70010000125118.name: Slot & Learn KATAKANA

70010000125909.description:
"Exodus: Creepy Time" is an exciting casual style game with elements of a simplified roguelike. An ominous journey through dark and gloomy locations awaits you, where every action you take has serious consequences. Survive in a world where darkness and horror lurk at every turn. Collect resources, upgrade your character and develop new skills to survive in this horror world.

Trapped in a world steeped in darkness and horror, where sinister forces rule every corner. The main character discovers that the world he is in has turned out to be cursed. People and animals have turned into mutants and monsters under the influence of dark forces. He is left alone with this horror, and his only goal is to find a way out of this nightmarish reality, but keep in mind time is inexorably ticking, and the curse is getting stronger by the hour. Will the hero be able to find the strength and wisdom to overcome the horrors of this "Creepy Time" and free himself from this dark web?
Immerse yourself in "Exodus: Creepy Time", where your every decision

Features:
- Simple and Addictive Gameplay
- Constant Threat
- Improvements and New Skills
- Bright cartoon graphics
- Cool characters
- An invigorating soundtrack
70010000125909.intro:
Survive the hordes
Upgrade your character
Unlock new stages
70010000125909.name: Exodus : Creepy Time

70010000126013.description:
Read the case carefully, study the illustration, and find the hidden clue that reveals the answer.

With simple controls and bite-sized puzzles, anyone can enjoy the feeling of being a detective.

Who among the suspects is the culprit?
Who is the real father?
Who has already passed away?

These and many more tricky mystery cases await!

Even if a question has you stumped, helpful hints will guide you forward.
Play solo, or challenge family and friends to see who can solve each case the fastest.

Use your intuition, observation skills, and deduction power to clear every mystery!

Recommended for players who enjoy:
Mystery quizzes, detective stories, suspense dramas, brain training, hidden clues, casual puzzle games, and observation challenges.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000126013.intro:
Can you uncover the truth?
A brain-teasing mystery quiz that tests your observation skills!
70010000126013.name: Criminal Profile Who’s the Culprit?!

70010000126077.description:
Welcome to a magical coloring adventure full of unicorns, fantasy animals, and imagination!

In Animal Coloring Book for Kids & Toddlers: Unicorns, children can discover many adorable unicorn pictures and bring them to life with their favorite colors. Cute unicorns, magical horses, rainbows, stars, clouds, enchanted scenes, and fantasy creatures invite kids to dream, create, and explore their imagination.

Choose from a wide variety of colors and enjoy two simple and intuitive coloring modes. Use the pen mode to draw and color freely, or use the paint bucket mode to fill larger areas quickly and easily. The pen size can be adjusted freely, making it easy to color both small details and bigger spaces.

For even more creative freedom, the line art can be hidden. This turns the page into a clean white canvas where children can create their very own drawings, magical worlds, and fantasy animals.

Thanks to the touchscreen controls of Nintendo Switch™, the game is simple, direct, and child-friendly. It is ideal for young children who love unicorns, horses, magical animals, drawing, fairy-tale worlds, and creative play. The game encourages imagination, creativity, fine motor skills, color recognition, and calm artistic expression in a playful way.

Enter a colorful fantasy world, choose your favorite unicorn, and start coloring! A relaxing and creative coloring game for kids and the whole family.
70010000126077.intro: Color magical unicorns, cute fantasy animals, rainbows, and enchanted scenes. A creative touchscreen coloring game for kids.
70010000126077.name: Animal Coloring Book for Kids & Toddlers: Unicorns

70010000126100.description:
■ How to Play

Throw, Merge, and Grow!: Just drop the "Yukkuri" into the bowl! When two of the same kind touch, they transform into a larger Yukkuri!

Don't Let Them Fall!: It's Game Over if the Yukkuri overflow from the bowl...

Aim for the High Score!: Growing them large and triggering consecutive merges (Chains) will skyrocket your score!

■ Reimu & Marisa’s Live Commentary!

Reimu and Marisa chat away with game-style commentary based on your play!

Their lively banter and reactions make every match even more exciting!

■ Fully Customizable Features

30 Different Yukkuri!: Play the game, earn points, and head to the shop to unlock new Yukkuri.

Customize the Evolution Order!: You can swap the order of evolution! Set your favorite character as the largest size and create your very own "Yukkuri Mountain"!

■ Various Game Modes

Multiplayer: Supports local matches for up to 4 players! Enjoy a heart-pounding stacking battle together!

Rankings: Compete with players worldwide for the top score and prove you’re the ultimate Yukkuri master!
70010000126100.intro:
3D Puzzle: Take It Easy!!!
Touhou Project characters are here in their "Yukkuri" forms!
70010000126100.name: Touhou Yukkuri Mountain – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70010000126249.description:
Get ready for an amazing adventure on an alien planet, full of dangers, puzzles and unexpected allies. Only you can help the cat fix his ship and leave this dangerous world.

The main character is a cat, a pilot of a small flying ship. After an accident, he finds himself on an unknown planet, where his goal is to collect fuses to fix the ship and return home.
On the way, the cat encounters various enemies, difficult levels and puzzles, as well as allies. The game is in the style of a 2D platformer, where the hero moves through the levels, jumps, fights enemies and collects the necessary items to repair the ship. The controls are simple and intuitive, which makes the game accessible to both beginners and experienced players.
Top-view puzzles: In some levels, the view switches to "from above", and you must solve puzzles to open access to the next stage.
Ship Repair Between levels, the hero returns to his ship, where he uses the collected diodes to repair it. With each new diode, the cat gets one step closer to fixing the ship and returning home.
Conclusion Get ready for an amazing adventure on an alien planet, full of dangers, puzzles and unexpected allies. Only you can help the cat fix his ship and leave this dangerous world.
70010000126249.intro:
Resolve puzzle
Repair spaceship
Precise movement
70010000126249.name: Alien Cat Story

70010000126511.description:
Silly physics-based forklift game inspired by Ghibli and Japanese car culture! Use your forklift skills in logic puzzles with many unexpected outcomes!

When all you have is a Forklift, everything looks like a palette.
Take a flight to Ghibli stylized JAPAN!
Let your forklift loose on a peaceful prefecture.

- Travel through the whole island and solve more than 30 puzzles to learn your story.
- Some truck takes your parking place? No problem, you can forklift them!
- Place Kei Cars in the right parking spots,
- They can have alarms,
- And might be Wired,
- Be smart about parking gates,
- Use illegal moves when no one sees,
- But sometimes you can help others.

Maybe they will show you how to cook Ramen? Of course, using a forklift!

Featuring:
- An elegant forklift straight from Japan (that's you)
- A lot of kei cars to stick on the fork,
- A dedicated beep button (!!!)
70010000126511.intro: Silly physics-based forklift game inspired by Japanese car culture!
70010000126511.name: Do You even Forklift?

70050000070523.description:
Walls of Judgment
Some places are built to confine the body.
Other places are built to attract strange, otherworldly spirits.
The Walls of Judgment introduces two grim new locations:
A prison where no one can hear you scream.
The church where you may hide from your nightmares.

Behind the iron bars and the locked doors, mortals wait, pace, and pray.
Mortals are unaware they are prey. In the prison, isolation and routine can drive you mad.
If you doubt this truth, ask inmate Kyle, who has been in prison serving a sentence extending into the afterlife.
In the church, faith is tested. Most win, most of the time. Others are less fortunate.

Justice may be blind… and fear can stare straight through you...
70050000070523.name: Walls of Judgment

70050000072011.description: This is a paid upgrade pass that allows you to upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ version of LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP to LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
70050000072011.intro: The cute yet sexy zombie hunter Juliet goes wild on Nintendo Switch™ 2!
70050000072011.name: LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000073349.description: By purchasing this content, the Nintendo Switch™ software "Touhou Yukkuri Mountain" can be upgraded to "Touhou Yukkuri Mountain – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition".
70050000073349.name: Touhou Yukkuri Mountain – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000081412.description:
Descend into a frightful world of action-adventure in Mina the Hollower. Take control of Mina, a renowned Hollower hurtled into a desperate mission to rescue a cursed island. Burrow beneath hazards and monsters, whip foes into oblivion, and gear up with an arsenal of sidearms and trinkets. Explore a vast world filled with pixel-perfect graphics, masterful gameplay, beastly bosses, and infectious music. Encounter a cast of bizarre characters, search out secrets in an array of exotic locales, and illuminate the omnipresent darkness in Mina the Hollower, a brand new game from the developers who brought you Shovel Knight!

Features:
- Hauntingly authentic 8-bit visuals, refined for the modern era.

- Modern touches abound: detailed animation, widescreen visuals, and rock-solid controls!

- Leap, dodge, and burrow through the ground to battle monsters or navigate the world.

- Lash at foes with your trusty whip, Nightstar- or choose from an arsenal of weapons, each with a totally different move set.

- Discover and utilize a reliquary's worth of unusual Sidearms to gain the advantage in combat.

- Collect and equip Trinkets to acquire a variety of exotic effects. Level Mina up to suit your unique playstyle.

- Electrifying 8-bit inspired soundtrack by chiptune virtuoso, Jake Kaufman.

- Descend into the depths of madness with a bone-chilling, yet heartwarming tale inspired by Victorian Gothic horror.

- Explore a huge, dark world brimming with secrets, challenging battles, and interconnected level design.
70010000081412.intro: A bone-chilling 8-bit action adventure, refined for the modern era.
70010000081412.name: Mina the Hollower

70010000110619.description:
Everything changed the moment the signal was lost.
A distant colony on planet Virelia has fallen silent after a mysterious bio-mechanical infection spread across the surface, consuming everything in its path. What was once a functioning world is now a hostile environment where technology and life have merged into something unpredictable and dangerous.

You are Captain Darius Vex, leader of an elite unit sent to investigate, contain, and eliminate the threat. The mission quickly turns into a fight for survival as you move through abandoned facilities, ruined cities, and infected zones where every step forward reveals new dangers.

Combat is shaped by choice and situation. You can move through shadows, disable enemy systems, and avoid detection, or engage directly using advanced energy-based weapons built for high-intensity encounters. Each approach changes how you experience the battlefield, forcing you to adapt constantly.

At the core of your abilities lies a powerful energy control system. You absorb and redirect energy to activate devices, disable threats, generate protective shields, or unleash powerful bursts that can turn the tide of battle. Managing energy becomes just as important as aiming and movement.

Exploration reveals more than just new paths. Hidden areas, data logs, and fragments of information begin to uncover the origin of the infection and what really happened on Virelia. The deeper you go, the more the line between machine and organism begins to disappear.

As you progress, your equipment evolves, your abilities expand, and the enemies grow more aggressive and intelligent. What begins as a mission becomes a descent into the core of an alien system that is still growing.

Survival is not guaranteed. Understanding the threat is the only way forward.
70010000110619.intro: Adapt or become part of it.
70010000110619.name: Dead Gears - Space of War

70010000112462.description:
Midnight Swamp is a dark point-and-click adventure where you will dive into a world of eerie fairy tales. Play as a tourist who must find a way out of a mysterious swamp, where every corner hides a riddle.

A mysterious laugh echoed from the lake on that restless summer night. One careless step outside the tent — and you find yourself dragged into a dark world of shifting swamps, inhabited by strange creatures and filled with hidden secrets.

Soon, a talking Cat convinces you to enter the inhospitable castle rising above the swamp, while the Witch from the gingerbread house teaches you the basics of potion brewing. Will you have the courage to uncover the mystery of this place?

Features:
- A variety of puzzles, potion crafting, and location exploration
- A dark swamp hiding a sinister secret
- Many strange inhabitants for you to meet
- Hand-drawn graphics
70010000112462.intro: A dark point-and-click adventure where you will dive into a world of eerie fairy tales
70010000112462.name: Midnight Swamp

70010000118978.description:
Kiko the bear has one goal: to bake the biggest apple pie ever for the annual Apple Festival! To do that, Kiko needs lots of apples.

Curious and excited, Kiko sets off on a wooden raft to explore fun and colorful islands, discovering new surprises and collecting apples along the way.

Some naughty creatures are trying to stop Kiko… But Kiko is clever and always one step ahead!

Features:
- About 2-4 hours playtime
- 50+ puzzles, on a gentle difficulty curve, ranging from easy to challenging
- Every puzzle can be freely skipped to return to later
- Enemies with fun and surprising behaviors
- Cartoony graphics
- Relaxing music and playful sounds
70010000118978.intro: Push apples, move the rafts, and outsmart silly enemies in this adorable puzzle adventure!
70010000118978.name: Kiko's Apple Adventure

70010000119596.description:
Your life has come to an end, when you find Frog God he seems impressed. Turns out most frog souls need a soul reaper to show them the way to the afterlife.

And there seems to be few soul reapers currently, which is why he offers you a job! You can earn reincarnation if you collect enough lost frog souls. 

For that task you’ve been gifted with the ability to stop and resume time at your will. You can also soot a projectile of goo you can ride!

Jump over moving platforms, avoid pits, spikes, and enemies to rescue those souls.

How many souls can you save? Find out in this timeless puzzle platformer.


Features
* Mix of 2D and 3D visuals
* 4 different biomes
* Time-stopping game mechanic
* Puzzle platformer
70010000119596.intro: Use your new ability to stop time to complete the levels
70010000119596.name: A Frog's Job 2: Froggina

70010000119646.description:
"There is a saying that when you depart from this world, the dog who went ahead will warmly welcome you."

Bong-gu the Welsh Corgi was once an abandoned dog. Judging by his docked tail, someone had once cared for him, but for some reason, he became unwanted. As an 8-year-old senior dog with various illnesses, it was hard for him to find a new family. Trapped in a cage at an animal shelter, each day passed gloomily for Bong-gu. Then one day, a miracle happened. Bong-gu met a new family. The man who took Bong-gu had a somewhat scruffy appearance and seemed slightly awkward, but Bong-gu loved his scent. From that day on, Bong-gu lived out his remaining days just like any other dog would: playing tug-of-war, running around, eating, and sleeping. In the end, he crossed the rainbow bridge, having lived out a simple yet joyful life.

Sniff sniff… this scent… One day in dog heaven, Bong-gu wakes from his nap to a very familiar scent. Sniff sniff… it's dad!. Though faint, surely it is dad's scent he has been waiting for. Jubilant, Bong-gu escapes dog heaven and embarks on a journey to meet his dad - a journey that may hold unexpected dangers. Just as his dad once found him by some miracle, it is now Bong-gu’s turn to find his dad.

Will Bong-gu be able to see his dad again?

[An adventure in a beautiful world filled with stories of dogs and people]

Teetering on the border between life and death, a world outside of dog heaven feels both familiar and strange. Embark on an adventure through beautifully crafted landscapes including deserts, snowy mountains, and beaches. Experience diverse gameplay across adventure, action, racing genres. And remember, Bong-gu is a dog! Actions like sniffing, barking, running, and jumping come with limitations. To overcome his limitations and reunite with his dad, he must meet, give, and receive help from people and other dogs, each with unique stories to share. Unlike cats, there is only so much a dog can do alone!

[In the end, this is a story for all of us]

At the end of his journey, Bong-gu finally reunites with his dad. The journey is filled with joy and excitement, but also moments of hardship and sadness. Yet, the ending has always been written: those destined to meet again will find their way back together. My Little Puppy may be a story about a dog, but it is also a story of relationships, farewells, and reunions that speaks to us all. For those waiting to see their once-in-a-lifetime friend or family member again, or those preparing for an inevitable parting that may come, we hope this story brings warm comfort. One day, we will meet again.
70010000119646.intro: "They say a dog who went ahead waits to welcome you in the end."
70010000119646.name: My Little Puppy

70010000120411.description:
RV Roadtrip Simulator is a challenging driving adventure where every kilometer tests your control and planning. Take the wheel of a heavy RV and travel through rough roads, narrow paths, and unpredictable terrain as you push forward across long and demanding routes.

Handle obstacles, manage your vehicle, and adapt to changing conditions while turning a simple road trip into a true test of skill and patience. Every decision on the road matters.

Key Features:
• Challenging Roadtrip – Drive across difficult routes filled with obstacles and uneven terrain.
 • Vehicle Management – Monitor fuel, damage, and essential systems to keep moving forward.
 • Physics-Based Challenges – Overcome realistic movement, weight, and traction on tricky surfaces.
 • Environmental Hazards – Face mud, slopes, tight paths, and unexpected road conditions.
 • Strategic Problem Solving – Use planning and smart decisions to overcome roadblocks.
 • Exploration-Focused Progression – Discover new paths and routes as you advance.

Keep the engine running, adapt to the road ahead, and push through every challenge. The journey is tough — reaching the destination is the real victory.
70010000120411.intro: Every road tells a different story of survival and skill.
70010000120411.name: RV ROADTRIP SIMULATOR

70010000123636.description:
Get ready for a cute and addictive savanna adventure. In Zoo Orbs Safari, adorable animals fall into glass containers full of personality, and it is up to you to merge them into bigger creatures. Combine two identical animals and climb the evolution chain until you reach the majestic Giraffe, the ultimate trophy of your run.

Each merge creates a small burst that nudges nearby pieces, triggering fun chain reactions and keeping the pile alive. It is easy to understand, but full of clever decisions with every drop.

Instead of short stages, the game features 5 replayable levels, each with a unique container shape and its own mission set. Three objectives are active at the same time, and whenever you complete one, a new one appears to keep the challenge fresh.

With no time pressure and no power-ups, everything depends on your ability to read the space, plan your drops, and handle the physics. Slopes, gaps, and tight spaces make each level feel different and strategic.

Complete mission sets to unlock new levels or keep playing in endless mode to chase higher scores. It is the perfect mix of light strategy, charming visuals, and that irresistible “just one more run” feeling.

Observe, merge, reorganize, and shape the savanna your way.
70010000123636.intro: Stack, Merge and Reach the Giraffe
70010000123636.name: Zoo Orbs: Safari

70010000125024.description:
Explore the haunting remnants of a world reshaped by fire and time. Scorched Lands is an atmospheric first-person exploration experience set across a vast, otherworldly desert landscape — where volcanic rock formations tower over ancient skeletal ruins, alien flora blooms defiantly from cracked earth, and the sky burns a permanent crimson.
You are a lone wanderer equipped with field instruments and a quiet curiosity. Seek out marked locations across a hostile yet breathtaking terrain — satellite dishes humming in the silence, solar arrays catching light on ridge lines, lava fields glowing just beyond the next canyon wall. Every destination tells a story. Every horizon promises something new.
Features:

Stunning low-poly art direction that transforms desolation into beauty
Multiple distinct biomes — scorched volcanic badlands, sun-bleached desert flats, and eerie overgrown ruins
A meditative, pressure-free pace — no enemies, no timers, just exploration
Rich environmental storytelling hidden in the landscape itself
Perfect for short sessions or long, unhurried wanderings
70010000125024.intro: The world burned. Something survived. So did you.
70010000125024.name: Scorched Lands

70010000127971.description:
Descend into a frightful world of action-adventure in Mina the Hollower. Take control of Mina, a renowned Hollower hurtled into a desperate mission to rescue a cursed island. Burrow beneath hazards and monsters, whip foes into oblivion, and gear up with an arsenal of sidearms and trinkets. Explore a vast world filled with pixel-perfect graphics, masterful gameplay, beastly bosses, and infectious music. Encounter a cast of bizarre characters, search out secrets in an array of exotic locales, and illuminate the omnipresent darkness in Mina the Hollower, a brand new game from the developers who brought you Shovel Knight!

Features:
- Hauntingly authentic 8-bit visuals, refined for the modern era.

- Modern touches abound: detailed animation, widescreen visuals, and rock-solid controls!

- Leap, dodge, and burrow through the ground to battle monsters or navigate the world.

- Lash at foes with your trusty whip, Nightstar- or choose from an arsenal of weapons, each with a totally different move set.

- Discover and utilize a reliquary's worth of unusual Sidearms to gain the advantage in combat.

- Collect and equip Trinkets to acquire a variety of exotic effects. Level Mina up to suit your unique playstyle.

- Electrifying 8-bit inspired soundtrack by chiptune virtuoso, Jake Kaufman.

- Descend into the depths of madness with a bone-chilling, yet heartwarming tale inspired by Victorian Gothic horror.

- Explore a huge, dark world brimming with secrets, challenging battles, and interconnected level design.
70010000127971.intro: A bone-chilling 8-bit action-adventure, refined for the modern era and enhanced for Nintendo Switch™ 2
70010000127971.name: Mina the Hollower - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70050000074217.description: A bone-chilling 8-bit action-adventure, refined for the modern era and enhanced for Nintendo Switch™ 2.
70050000074217.name: Mina the Hollower - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition upgrade pack

70070000036264.description:
Your adventure begins with Food Truck Tycoon. Cook, chop, bake and enjoy hundreds of unique dishes.

But the journey of a thousand dishes is just the beginning!

As you hone your cooking skills and build your reputation with food trucks, you'll be given the opportunity to explore more gourmet games as DLC.

Customize your kitchen with countless upgrades and serve delicious food in different locations. Keep the grill hot, keep your customers smiling, sauté, mix and serve to the top.

Face cooking challenges to become the ultimate chef in town!

So put on your apron, sharpen your knives and enter the cooking arena. Life is a party - let's cook delicious!

This bundle contains "Cooking Arena", "Burger Chef Tycoon" and "Breakfast Bar Tycoon".
70070000036264.intro: Universe bursting with flavors and culinary adventures awaits!
70070000036264.name: Cooking Arena Discovery Edition

70070000036268.description:
Inspired by the classics, developed for the modern audiences.

A classic revenge story set in a medieval fantasy world… with a touch of deadly modern firepower just to turn things up to eleven. Fight through the armies of undead, mutants, aliens, machines and beasts in order to get back what is rightfully yours and bring some semblance of peace back to the land. Who knows - if you’re thorough enough you might even discover the history of the kingdom itself, long lost to the scholars of the realm.

Knights & Guns brings you to a dangerous world where you will fight, alongside your friend, against demons, ghouls & ghosts. Use shotguns, lasers and the power of chivalry to overcome every obstacle. Become the best version of a knight - one with a gun.

Inside the game:
•	Fight awesome bosses on various stages! 
•	Conquer the non-linear world! Rush through over 150 hand crafted stages, or enjoy the game at your own pace, looking for secrets and special routes!
•	Entire game designed for both single player or co-op multiplayer. Invite a friend at any time for some extra firepower and mayhem.
•	60 fps gameplay! Try the different modes! Hunt the monsters! Survive! Play on small, big and narrow maps!
•	Check out all the awesome suits of armor and, of course, all the GUNS! Lasers, shotguns, grenade launchers, sniper rifles... They are all here!
•	Over 30 unique guns. (That’s probably more flavors of death than flavors of ice cream you can name.)
•	Over 25 types of enemies, 5 types of mini-bosses and 3 types of bosses. Most of these come in different colors, too.
•	30 unique suits of armor for the knights. Extra protection and extra style!
•	Traps, chests, keys, scrolls of lore, books of monsters...

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #1,  Armor Pack #3 and Armor Pack #4 with:

- 10 new levels for you to bring back the peace
- 8 new armors to help you on your quest
- New enemies for that extra little kick
70070000036268.intro: Knight in shining armor, fight your way... with Guns!
70070000036268.name: Knights & Guns Add-on Edition

70070000036271.description:
Urban Flow is a game about the subtle beauty of city streets filled with cars moving in perfect harmony. But such order does not happen all by itself - the city needs YOU to control the traffic lights and to make sure everything goes smoothly. That means no crashes, no jams. Everything will run perfectly - as long as you stay focused!

Immerse yourself in a beautiful, hand-crafted, low-poly world to discover the enormous satisfaction of watching the hundreds of tiny, colorful cars flowing through the streets – all while listening to the chill, urban music.

Over 100 levels, each with its own busy intersection. You have one job: operate the lights and keep it safe.

Party Game (even if you party all alone!)
-----
 Play by yourself or with friends in scalable drop-in, drop-out local co-op mode for two, three, or four players!
You can help your friends or be a little rascal and spread the chaos!

Avoid accidents by paying close attention to special vehicles and to the other players. Special vehicles include the ambulance, which can’t wait for long, and the tank – which will plow through anything in its way.

Don’t want to play the campaign?
-----
 Try our score-based Endless Mode or the Chill Mode - where you play for as long as you want, no rush and no score - only you and the music. Urban Flow is designed to be a great single player experience!

Discover various environments and weather conditions. Play with touch controls, Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller or Joy-Con™. Complete challenges and unlock rewards.

This bundle includes base game, London Rules, Winter Expansion Pack and Streets Supplement #3 with:

•    40 new stages!
•    7 new vehicles (withthe firetruck and snow plow!)
•    Enjoy the winter theme and new music!
70070000036271.intro: Manage the city lights and try to avoid the chaos!
70070000036271.name: Urban Flow Enhancement Edition

70010000117346.description:
Step into the world of used car trading where every deal can turn into big profit — or a costly mistake. Buy cheap vehicles from owners, negotiate for the best prices, restore damaged cars, and resell them to grow your business from a small garage into a successful reseller empire.

Explore different parts of the city in search of valuable deals, hidden bargains, and rare vehicles. From private sellers to competitive auctions, every opportunity depends on your negotiation skills, smart investments, and ability to spot profitable cars before anyone else.

As your business expands, you’ll restore more valuable vehicles, improve your workshop, and build a reputation as one of the city’s top car resellers. Every car has potential — if you can turn it into profit.

Key Features:
• Car Restoration: Clean, polish, and repair used vehicles to increase their market value before selling.
• Owner Negotiations: Bargain with car owners and lower prices to maximize your profit on every deal.
• Competitive Car Auctions: Join exciting auctions, outbid rivals, and win valuable or rare vehicles.
• Business Progression: Start small, grow your reputation, expand your workshop, and build a successful reseller career.
• Vehicle Variety: Buy and trade different types of used cars with unique conditions and values.

Turn cheap used cars into valuable profits and build your career as the city’s top car reseller. Every deal is a new opportunity to grow your business and expand your reputation.
70010000117346.intro: Grow from a small dealer into a successful automotive tycoon.
70010000117346.name: Car Sales Simulator

70010000123664.description: In this 3D narrative exploration adventure, you take control of Bisteca, a house cat who finds himself caught in an urban predicament. Complete over 30 varied missions to earn coins and gather information, help residents, make deliveries, and when things take a darker turn, venture into the city’s underworld to uncover clues about a mysterious disappearance.
70010000123664.intro: A Whisker-Tingling Mystery! An emotional and lighthearted story that proves that, sometimes, what we’re looking for is closer than we think.
70010000123664.name: Cat in a Jam: City Secrets

70070000036727.description:
The land is overrun by hungry orcs, skeletons, ghosts, rats, and other dangerous creatures, and only the strongest will last! Fight through wave after wave of enemies, face powerful bosses, and upgrade your hero to become unstoppable.

Every run is a new challenge! Choose your upgrades wisely and shape your build as you progress. Open treasure chests, gather experience, and stay in the fight as the enemy waves grow stronger.

Barbarous: Survivor's Quest Complete Edition includes the base game and all DLC, giving you even more ways to survive the horde. Explore the Northern Reaches, the Badlands, and the Mages Guild, meet Gwen, Rogz, and Varizz, and discover new weapons and abilities that bring even more variety to every run.

Improve your stats, unlock powerful weapons, and collect valuable rewards as you carve your way through the chaos!

Features:
- Fight waves of orcs, skeletons, ghosts, rats, and more
- Explore 3 additional maps with extreme difficulty: Northern Reaches, Badlands, and Mages Guild
- Meet 3 new brave characters: Rogz, Gwen, and Varizz
- Discover 3 new powerful weapons: Lute Axe, Fist of the North, and Eye of the Void
- Shape your build with many weapons and items
- Face powerful bosses and earn valuable rewards
- Upgrade and evolve your gear!
- Power up and become the ultimate hero

How long can you survive before the horde overwhelms you?
70070000036727.intro: Battle the horde and survive the quest!
70070000036727.name: Barbarous: Survivor's Quest - Complete Edition

70010000114839.description:
Liquor Store Simulator is a simulation game about developing your own store. You start your business in a small shop that you bought on credit.

Buy goods, manage your store, hire staff. Who knows, maybe you will be able to make a real alcohol empire out of a small store.

At first, it won’t be easy—you’ll have to work at the checkout yourself, accept deliveries, keep records, and maintain order in the sales area. But hard work and smart decisions will help you turn a modest retail outlet into a thriving store with a wide selection and satisfied customers.

Management
Purchase goods, arrange retail equipment as you see fit.

Draft Beer
Feel like a bartender. Pour customers the beer they desire.

Staff Management
At first, you’ll have to do everything yourself. But as your store grows, you won’t be able to handle it alone. Hire employees for efficient store management.

Customization
Change the color of walls, ceilings, and floors. Make your store unique and unlike any other.
70010000114839.name: Liquor Store Simulator

70010000100173.description:
Tale of Dark Lands - a magical fantasy action RPG with an elegant low-poly style and the charm of a timeless fairy tale. Immerse yourself in a world of mysteries, perils, and glorious adventures!

A story full of secrets and challenges.
The main hero is a brave mercenary hired by the residents of a small village to defend them against fierce goblin raids. But what begins as a simple job turns into something far greater. Soon, the hero becomes entwined in an ancient dark tale that threatens the entire land, and only he can stop the encroaching darkness.

Create the hero of your dreams.
A flexible character editor lets you craft a hero with a unique appearance.
Develop your character: earn experience, acquire new skills, and grow stronger with every battle!

Immerse yourself in thrilling gameplay.
Gear and customization: Find or buy unique items – from shining swords to sturdy armor, bows, and magical helmets.
Crafting and upgrades: Gather resources, forge powerful equipment at the village blacksmith, and enhance your gear using runes in the Runic Forge.
Unique skill system: Learn new abilities from the experienced skill trader.
A variety of items: Equipment, artifacts for trade, runes, crafting materials – just make sure everything fits in your grid-based inventory.

Game features:
- Story-driven adventure: A rich yet concise gameplay experience.
- Visual style: Beautiful low-poly design that creates a magical fantasy atmosphere.
- Thoughtful inventory system: A convenient grid-based item storage system.
- Crafting and upgrades: Collect resources and craft gear at the blacksmith.
- Trading and economy: Buy equipment, sell unwanted items, and discover rare finds.
- Hero equipment: A vast selection of gear for your character.
- Character customization: Use the editor to create your unique hero.

Tale of Dark Lands is an epic journey filled with secrets, dangerous foes, and incredible rewards. Become the hero who will face the ancient evil and etch your name into legend!
70010000100173.intro: Magical fantasy action RPG with an elegant low-poly style and the charm of a timeless fairy tale.
70010000100173.name: Tale of Dark Lands

70010000121063.description:
Counter Call - Half Escape Shooter Enter a high-intensity first-person shooter built for nonstop action and fast decision-making. Every mission throws you straight into combat, where quick reflexes, precision aiming, and smart positioning are the only way to survive. Fight through waves of enemies across compact, action-driven maps designed to keep you constantly engaged. 

There’s no downtime — every route leads to new encounters, pushing you to stay alert and react instantly to threats coming from all directions. Adapt your playstyle to each situation. Choose the right weapon, switch tactics on the fly, and handle both close-range aggression and controlled, long-distance combat. Success depends on how well you read the battlefield and respond under pressure. Enjoy smooth controls and responsive mechanics that make movement, aiming, and shooting feel sharp and satisfying. Every encounter is direct, intense, and rewarding for players who think fast and act faster. 

Key Features: 
	•	Fast-paced FPS gameplay with continuous action 
	•	Wave-based enemy encounters
	•	Compact maps designed for constant engagement
	•	Flexible combat styles: aggressive or tactical 
	•	Smooth controls and responsive shooting mechanics 
	•	Increasing challenge that tests reflexes and precision
Step into the zone. Eliminate the threat. Win.
70010000121063.name: Counter Call - Half Escape Shooter

70010000107270.description:
If you're ready to run and play a deadly game of hide-and-seek, then come on in and make yourself at home. Behind the door, endless oppressive corridors, filthy walls, deadly traps, and a ravenous creature eagerly waiting to get up close and personal with you await.

There are doors that should remain locked. There are places that no one should ever visit. Secrets hidden in the shadows should not come to light.

But if you do wander into one of these places, know this: your enemy is strong and dangerous. He plays with your emotions and feelings as he pleases. Run away from there as fast as you can and don't look back. After all, there is no enemy more cruel and insidious than your own past.

Plot:
For several months now, Alex has been having the same nightmare.
He tries to solve the problem on his own, but it leads to nothing. So, the boy decides to ask for help from a professional. But psychologist Dr. Amanda Silk is not Alex's only ally on the thorny path of his hostile consciousness.
A meeting with an old friend is also ahead. Together, they will have to go through many traps and fight monsters to reveal the secrets of the dark past.

Features:
- A grim atmosphere that immerses you in a world of horror and suffering
- Unpredictable events will keep you on edge from the first scene to the last
- Unusual character and monster design
- An original soundtrack and realistic sound effects that create a sense of presence, helping you experience the protagonist's emotions
70010000107270.intro: Are you ready to run and play a deadly game of hide-and-seek?
70010000107270.name: Scarlet Wolf

70010000119793.description: Smash and break everyone on your way down the slope. There is no time to stop and no time for mercy.  Just charge forward, ignoring all obstacles.
70010000119793.intro: You are a wheel. A truly deadly wheel. No one will be safe in your path.
70010000119793.name: Rolling Wheels

70010000119936.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Anmyeon-eup, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
 high-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery.
70010000119936.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Anmyeon-eup

70010000120848.description:
The 'Crayon' series, responsible for children's creativity worldwide, finally arrives in the most mysterious world, <Crayon Magic World>! In this series, you can meet friends from the Magic World that only existed in imagination, including legendary unicorns, beautiful mermaids, brave dragons, and mysterious nine-tailed foxes.

Unleash your children's imagination with an intuitive interface that anyone can easily enjoy without complicated rules, and a variety of colors that perfectly capture the texture of real crayons. The sight of the fantastic characters you carefully colored coming to life will give children a special sense of accomplishment and a magical experience. Open the door to the Magic World now, the most beautiful digital sketchbook that offers both educational fun and emotional stability!
70010000120848.intro: Mystical friends met in dreams awaken in vibrant colors at my fingertips!
70010000120848.name: CRAYON MAGIC WORLD

70010000122768.description:
Get ready for a radiant journey in Golem Lights, an engaging puzzle where every beam of light can change everything. Take control of the Mage Golem and use its energy to illuminate the path, awaken other golems, and create luminous connections until you reach the mysterious Crystal Portal.

With 60 levels spread across three enchanting biomes, from the cave’s edge to the crystal core, each challenge invites you to experiment, adjust, and discover new solutions. With no time limits, the experience is relaxed yet strategic, perfect for players who enjoy thinking calmly and testing different possibilities.

Watch as light gradually reveals the environment, activate golems with unique abilities, and manipulate the surroundings to expand your illumination. Each stage is a small puzzle of logic and creativity, where planning and curiosity go hand in hand.

Explore, experiment, and let your light guide the way to victory.
70010000122768.intro: Light the Path, Awaken the Golems
70010000122768.name: Golem Lights

70010000123691.description:
Learning is fun when you have friends around!

Meet the animals, plants, people and other lovely things that you can find around farms, forests, or seas and oceans.

Learn shapes, match colorful pictures with their silhouettes, get to know their names, and make the final picture come to life through interacting with different things!

A suitable adventure for even the youngest of curious explorers!
70010000123691.intro: Play and learn who lives in farmlands, forests and seas!
70010000123691.name: Animal Puzzles

70010000126452.description:
Welcome to Fish In — a relaxing yet addictive fishing adventure built for everyone who loves the thrill of a perfect catch.

Explore beautifully crafted worlds, each brimming with unique fish, hidden secrets, and breathtaking scenery. From tranquil forest ponds to mysterious deep-sea trenches, every location offers new species to discover and new challenges to master.

Cast your line and feel the excitement as rare and legendary fish tug at your rod. Build a massive collection of beautifully designed fish — each one hand-crafted with vibrant colors and charming detail. Track your progress, unlock new species, and chase the rarest catches in the game.

Upgrade your fishing gear to reach deeper waters and distant shores. Better rods, stronger lines, and specialized lures open up a world of possibilities. Trade with other anglers, sell your prized catches, and invest in the equipment you need to become the ultimate angler.

With charming character designs, gorgeous environments, and dozens of unique fish to collect, Fish In is a fishing experience unlike any other. Whether you have five minutes or five hours, every session rewards you with something new.

Pick up your rod. The water is calling.
70010000126452.intro: Cast your line across stunning worlds. Catch rare fish, upgrade your gear, and build the ultimate collection. Your fishing adventure awaits!
70010000126452.name: Fish In

70010000118695.description: Dash through a frozen world as a brave seal in this dynamic endless runner! Avoid cracking ice floes, leap over obstacles, and escape predators while collecting fish and unlocking new abilities. Simple gameplay, increasing challenge, and a stunning icy landscape will keep you running for more!
70010000118695.intro: Help the seal overcome the obstacles!
70010000118695.name: Seals from the frosty Bay

70010000120147.description:
Two styles of racing. One complete driving experience.

Enter a world where speed takes different forms — from powerful street machines to high-performance formula cars built for precision and control. Car Racing - Auto & Formula Sport combines two distinct racing styles into one experience, offering both dynamic road racing and professional track competition.

Switch between car racing and formula racing, each with its own driving feel and challenges. Street races focus on control and quick reactions, while formula racing requires precision, timing, and smooth handling. This contrast keeps every race fresh and engaging.

Race across a variety of environments designed to test your driving skills. From open roads to structured circuits, every track pushes your speed, control, and ability to stay focused under pressure.

Choose your vehicle and adapt your driving style to each race. Faster cars demand quick decisions, while formula vehicles require perfect balance and control at high speeds. As you progress, races become more intense and competitive, challenging you to improve with every lap.

Key Features:

- Two Racing Styles: Car racing and formula racing in one game
- Diverse Vehicles: Drive both street cars and high-speed formula cars
- Multiple Tracks: Race across different environments and circuits
- Skill-Based Driving: Focus on control, timing, and precision
- Progressive Challenge: Increasing difficulty and competitive races
- Smooth Controls: Responsive handling for better performance

Master both racing styles and prove you have what it takes to dominate every track.
Drive faster. React quicker. Stay in control.
70010000120147.intro: Power or precision — choose your race
70010000120147.name: Car Racing - Auto & Formula Sport

70010000120715.description:
Steamboat Incident is a 3D survival horror experience set aboard a steamboat lost in the middle of the open sea. You have been kidnapped by the crazy monster. It is said that the monster went crazy after being locked up and away for over 95 years.

Captured and trapped with no clear way out, you wake up and must explore the ship’s tight corridors and rusting decks in search of clues, tools, and a way to escape.

But you are not alone. The monster is still there, reacting to sound and movement. Every step, every creak of the floorboards could give you away.

Hide, stay quiet, and think carefully as you solve puzzles and fix the steamboat in order to escape.

Features:
* A terrifying journey across the open ocean, stranded on a decaying steamboat while something hunts you from the depths. 
* Explore tight passageways and claustrophobic corridors as you uncover the steamboat dark secrets. 
* Search the steamboat for parts needed to fix the wheel and escape.
* Scavenge for clues, supplies, and hiding spots to stay one step ahead of the creature trying to hunt you down. 
* Find items like canned food to recover, and broken wheel parts to bring the steamboat back to life. 
* Evade a horrifying barnacle-covered entity stalking the ship - run, hide, and survive. Take cover under tables or inside rooms to avoid detection. 
* Use tools like crowbars to break into locked areas and reveal hidden paths and deeper mysteries.
70010000120715.intro: Trapped at sea on a steamboat - fix it, hide, and escape
70010000120715.name: Steamboat Incident

70010000121218.description:
Take control of a combat helicopter and enter missions where every second matters. Support ground forces, eliminate threats, and complete objectives in fast-paced aerial operations.
Engage in intense missions across dynamic environments where threats come from every direction. Each situation pushes you to react quickly, manage resources, and adapt your strategy in real time.
Stay in constant motion while navigating compact, action-focused maps filled with enemies, hazards, and objectives. From urban conflict zones to military bases, every location tests your control and decision-making.
Use a mix of weapons and systems to handle different combat scenarios. Suppress enemies with your machine gun, launch rockets against heavy targets, and manage fuel and ammo carefully to stay operational.
